flowchart TD
    A["RPC Client"]
    B["**TCP Socket**<br/>· Connection management<br/>· Byte-stream transport<br/>· Remote access channel"]
    C["**JSON Protocol**<br/>· Request/response wrapper<br/>· Event message format<br/>· Argument serialization"]
    D["**RPC Server**<br/>· Parses remote requests<br/>· Forwards service calls<br/>· Maintains session state"]
    E["**ServiceManager**<br/>· Finds target service<br/>· Binds service instance<br/>· Keeps permission boundary"]
    F["**ServiceBase**<br/>· Executes service functions<br/>· Emits service events<br/>· Exposes registries"]
    G["**Function / Event Registries**<br/>· Function entries<br/>· Event sources<br/>· Schema metadata"]

    A -->|"Opens connection"| B
    B -->|"Transports messages"| C
    C -->|"Decodes request"| D
    D -->|"Delegates call"| E
    E -->|"Locates service"| F
    F -->|"Queries interfaces"| G
    G -.->|"Event notifications"| A
